Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java.abstraction

Class KeYJavaType

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.abstraction.KeYJavaType
All Implemented Interfaces:
ProgramModelElement, Type, ModelElement, NamedModelElement
public class KeYJavaType extends Object implements Type
The KeY java type realises a tuple (sort, type) of a logic sort and the java type (for example a class declaration). In contrast to other classes the KeYJavaType is not immutable, so use it with care.

    • getDefaultValue

      public Literal getDefaultValue()
      Returns the default value of the given type according to JLS Sect. 4.5.5; returns null if this is not a real Java type.
      Specified by:

      Returns:
